cases.name: presence-fanout
cases.covers: Server→client presence join fanout control message (SPEC.md §8.6.2)

invalid.name: wake-requires-pull-false
invalid.covers: sync event with requiresPull !== literal true is malformed (SPEC.md §8.3)

invalid.name: hello-fractional-cursor
invalid.covers: Fractional numeric field in a known event is malformed — realtime numbers are integers within the i64 safe range (SPEC.md §8.1)

invalid.name: presence-unknown-kind
invalid.covers: Presence fanout with a kind outside the closed set join|update|leave is malformed (SPEC.md §8.6.2)

invalid.name: presence-scalar-doc
invalid.covers: Client→server presence publish with a non-object non-null doc is malformed (SPEC.md §8.6.2)
